response.justification: Bogdan's resume shows extensive experience in software development, particularly in web, mobile, and embedded systems, with a focus on full-stack engineering and AI-agent infrastructure. However, his background lacks direct experience in hardware optimization, SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or deep-learning workload optimization required for the Principal Performance Architect role. His education and work history do not align closely with the core responsibilities, such as analyzing performance bottlenecks in AI accelerators or creating prototypes for hardware-software co-design.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with a variety of languages and frameworks
Proven track record in optimizing systems and infrastructure, including AI-agent tools
Demonstrated ability to work in diverse technical domains, including low-latency and real-time systems
concerns: No direct experience in hardware optimization, SoC/IP modeling, or AI accelerator architectures
Lacks education or professional experience in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Limited exposure to system architecture design for hardware-software co-design

key_factors.factor: Hardware optimization and SoC/IP modeling experience
Deep-learning workload and GPU architecture expertise
System architecture and hardware-software co-design background
